title: dasycephala alata
intro: Dasycephala alata, also known as the Alpine Saw-wort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dasycephala alata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and creams to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
